papers.title: Deep Learning Approaches for Natural Language Processing in Sentiment Analysis
papers.summary: Transformer-based deep learning models applied to sentiment analysis on large-scale social media datasets.

papers.title: Low Power VLSI Design Techniques for Energy-Efficient Computing
papers.authors: Dr. Biswarup Mukherjee, Dr. Shukla Banik
papers.summary: Energy-efficient VLSI techniques including power gating and dynamic voltage scaling for modern processors.

papers.title: IoT-Based Smart Agriculture: Machine Learning Approaches for Crop Monitoring
papers.authors: Anirbit Sengupta, Sumana Mahanta, Dr. Shivnath Ghosh
papers.summary: IoT-enabled crop monitoring systems using machine learning for disease detection and yield prediction.

papers.title: Advanced Image Processing Techniques for Medical Diagnosis
papers.authors: Dr. Saumya Das, Riya Das, Pritam Paul
papers.summary: Deep learning–based image processing techniques for automated diagnosis using X-ray and MRI scans.

papers.title: Blockchain and IoT Integration for Secure Distributed Systems
papers.summary: Secure IoT architectures using blockchain for transparency and tamper-proof data management.

papers.title: Cognitive Computing: Integrating AI with Human-like Reasoning
papers.summary: Cognitive computing systems that merge AI with principles from cognitive science for human-like reasoning.
